title: 000 release-cleanup phase map omits on-disk child 000-spec-tree-consolidation

findingDetails.evidence: The phase map at lines 120-130 lists only phases 1 through 9. But graph metadata lists `000-release-cleanup/000-spec-tree-consolidation` as a direct child at graph-metadata.json:7, context-index.md:7 says 000-release-cleanup hosts that regrouping task, and the child spec reports `| **Status** | Complete |` at 000-spec-tree-consolidation/spec.md:56.
findingDetails.why: The parent phase map is supposed to be the traceable child/status inventory. Omitting an on-disk completed child makes the map incomplete and can mislead resume/review operators into thinking there are nine children when the graph has ten.
findingDetails.recommendation: Add `000-spec-tree-consolidation/` to the 000-release-cleanup phase documentation map with its `Complete` status, and refresh description/metadata so generated child listings agree with graph-metadata.

title: Research/doctrine aggregate status remains stale despite complete child phase maps

findingDetails.evidence: Root map line 128 marks track 001 as `In Progress`. The nested map marks peck as `In Progress` and old-006 gem as `Phase Parent` at 001-research-and-doctrine/spec.md:106-107. But peck parent has `completion_pct: 100` at 001-peck-teachings-adoption/spec.md:30 and its child map lines 116-122 are all `Complete`; gem parent has `completion_pct: 100` at 002-gem-team-adoption/spec.md:29 and its child map lines 109-111 are all `Complete`. context-index.md:12 maps old `006-gem-team-adoption` to this gem child.
findingDetails.why: The regression target was status truth for phase parents with shipped children. These maps still expose unfinished/type labels instead of completed aggregate progress, so users resuming the epic see stale work state for 001 and the remapped old 006 phase.
findingDetails.recommendation: Promote the 001 research/doctrine row to `Complete`, update 001-research-and-doctrine child rows for peck and gem to completed aggregate statuses, and refresh graph/description metadata so status fields no longer conflict with the completed child maps.
